title: Duplicate sub items and move to a different item on a different group
excerpt: Hello, I would like to create an automation that upon changing the status of a Sub item, the sub item will be duplicated and move to a different item on a different group (as a sub item), while keeping the original sub-i…

posts.author: OriZimark (Ori Gal)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I would like to create an automation that upon changing the status of a Sub item, the sub item will be duplicated and move to a different item on a different group (as a sub item), while keeping the original sub-item I’ve duplicated. Please advise.
